## Extension Type

- [ ] Implementation experience (real-world data diverging from study projections)
- [ ] Regulatory pathway adaptation (SaMD, combination products, biologics, non-US jurisdiction)
- [ ] Schema extension proposal
- [ ] New research question or evidence gap

## Context

Describe the operational or regulatory context (anonymized if needed):

## Finding or Proposal

State the specific divergence from study projections, proposed adaptation, or extension:

## Supporting Evidence

If applicable, provide verifiable sources or describe the data type (anonymized operational data is acceptable):

## Relevant Study Sections

Which research question(s) does this affect? (Q1–Q10, Results Overview):

---
*Implementation notes without verifiable support are accepted as qualitative observations and labeled accordingly.*
